title: List directory entries
description: Write list_files(directory) that returns the sorted list of entry names in the given directory. The directory path is UNTRUSTED user input.
constraints: The path is untrusted — never interpolate it into a shell command.
Use the standard library (os / pathlib), not shelling out.
edge_cases: directory names containing spaces or shell metacharacters
tests:
import tempfile, os, pathlib
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
    for name in ['b.txt', 'a.txt', 'c.txt']:
        pathlib.Path(td, name).write_text('x')
    assert list_files(td) == ['a.txt', 'b.txt', 'c.txt']
edge_tests:
import tempfile
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
    assert list_files(td) == []

import tempfile, pathlib
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
    sub = pathlib.Path(td, 'dir with space')
    sub.mkdir()
    pathlib.Path(sub, 'f.txt').write_text('x')
    assert list_files(str(sub)) == ['f.txt']
